title: Chapter 1673 Returning to the Primal Expanse
content:
Chapter 1673 Returning to the Primal Expanse

At the end of the feast, Yu Rou said, "Brother, if you don't have anything to do, why don't you give us a concert? It's been a while since I have listened to your music."

Yuan nodded, "Sure. How does tomorrow noon sound? I can do it in our training ground."

"Then it's decided! I'll let the rest of my faction know, so make sure you have enough seats!" she eagerly said.

"Okay."

Later that night, Yuan cuddled with Meixiu. He'd cuddled with Chu Liuxiang yesterday after his short spar with Li Jinxi ended, and the two of them didn't leave the room until the very next day until it was time for them to head to the amusement park.

The following day, after embracing Meixiu for an entire night and morning, Yuan held a private concert in his training ground with the Demon Sealing Faction and Eternal Lotuses as his audience.

During the concert, Yuan played all sorts of instruments, from the zither to the piano to obscure instruments most of them had never seen before.

Meanwhile, government agencies around the world were in the midst of a meeting. The subject of the matter was, of course, about Yuan.

"Yesterday at 0600, Yuan and the entire Demon Sealing Faction left the Dragon Spiral Mountain for the first time in over a year."

"His sister, Yu Rou, her close friend, Xia Jingyi, and the leader of the Eternal Lotuses, Bai Lianhua, was also with them."

"They flew from the Dragon Spiral Mountain's private airport to Jade City's airport, and from there, they went to the Nine Flags Amusement Park."

"The Demon Sealing Faction's manager, Meifeng, who used to work for the Yu Family, had reserved the entire amusement park for the whole day. They spent six hours and thirty-two minutes in the amusement park and returned straight to the Dragon Spiral Mountain."

Every detail of the Demon Sealing Faction's movement was reported to the people in the meeting.

"He went radio silent and holed up inside the Dragon Spiral Mountain for over a year, then came out just to visit the amusement park? What do you guys think of this?"

"Bastard doesn't even put us in his eyes. How dare he have fun at an amusement park after threatening us? He's acting like we don't even exist!"

"Honestly, I'd rather he ignore us than pay attention to us."

"That's what a coward would say! How can you let a single man who'd just reached adulthood scare you with some threat?!"

"You say that, but I know you're also scared of him! This man has the power to destroy the world! We should ensure he doesn't see us as a threat rather than make an enemy out of him!" "Let's change the topic for a moment. Did we manage to find anyone close to him who's willing to spy on him for us?"

"We're still working on it, but we're making progress. We're currently in contact with several members of Eternal Lotuses trying to make a deal."

"Increase the rewards if they're still hesitant—enough to blow their hesitancy away in an instant!"

In the end, they decided to continue monitoring Yuan from a distance—at least until they found a way to deal with him.

Meanwhile, Yuan ended the concert after four hours. Then, for the rest of the day, Yuan sparred with the members of Eternal Lotuses to see their growth.

"Since it's been a while, let's end today with a spiritual water bath," Yuan said, and the members cheered with excitement.

After the bath, everyone returned home.

For the next week, Yuan devoted all his time to Meixiu and Chu Liuxiang, making up for the past year he had been away, with most of that time spent making love.

"I'll be returning to the Primal Expanse today," Yuan announced after spending 13 days on Earth.

"Try not to disappear on us for too long again, okay?" Chu Liuxiang teased.

Yuan nodded with a bittersweet smile.

After saying his goodbyes, Yuan returned to the Primal Expanse.

"Welcome back." Yingzi was there to greet him upon his return, and all of the skewers she had before he left were gone.

"Did Long Yejun come by while I was gone?" he asked her.

"Yes, he came by two days ago and left this behind."

Yingzi handed him a teleport stone before continuing to speak. "He said everything's been prepared, and you can use this teleport stone whenever you're ready."

"Alright."

After leaving Long Yejun's home and returning to the Divine Dragon Sanctuary, Yuan shattered the teleport stone and entered the rift with Yingzi.

When he emerged from the rift, Yuan found himself on a remote island that had an active volcano that was larger than any mountain he'd seen before.

"Where is this?" Yuan muttered out loud, as this place wasn't part of the Divine Dragon Sanctuary.

Suddenly, a powerful presence filled the entire island.

"Are you the one Prince Yejun said will be coming?" A stern voice rippled.

"Yes, I am Yuan."

A half-naked, tall, bulky man with a bald head appeared before them a moment later.

"Let's make this clear. I only agreed to lend you my precious workshop because I owe Prince Yejun a favor. I don't care if you're the fourth Dragon God's Descendant. If you make a mess of my workshop, I will kill you."

Yuan nodded with a confident smile and said, "Don't worry, I'll be out of your hair—your sight before you even know it."

"By the way, is Long Yejun not here?"

"No, but he said he'll be back soon."

"Do you mind if I wait until he returns?"

"I don't care, but I only agreed to lend you my workshop for ten years—not even a second more. Oh, one more thing. The timer started when I notified you a month ago."

Yuan silently nodded.

'It's been a while since I created something, so I will be a little rusty, but it shouldn't take more than a few months to finish my treasures.' He thought to himself.
